context_pack.company_context: [uncertain: No specific company or product was provided in the user materials.]
context_pack.product_context: Fridge cleaning products typically include specialized sprays, wipes, or solutions designed to safely clean and disinfect the interior surfaces of refrigerators without damaging them. Key differentiators often include non-toxic ingredients, eco-friendly formulations, and antibacterial properties.
context_pack.industry_context: The home cleaning products market has been growing with a focus on eco-friendly and non-toxic solutions as consumers become more health and environmentally conscious.

terminology_glossary.Disinfectant: A chemical agent used to destroy bacteria and viruses on surfaces.
terminology_glossary.Eco-friendly: Products designed to have minimal harmful effects on the environment.
terminology_glossary.Non-toxic: Substances that are not harmful to human health.

typical_workflows.traditional_process: A traditional fridge cleaning workflow involves: 1) Removing all items from the fridge, 2) Disposing of expired or unwanted items, 3) Using a cleaning solution to wipe down all surfaces, 4) Drying surfaces before returning items. Optimized cleaning products may offer faster drying times or require less scrubbing.

uncertainties: [uncertain: specific company associated with the inquiry]

key_points: Use non-toxic and eco-friendly cleaning products
Ensure antibacterial properties for effective cleaning
Steps to remove odors and maintain hygiene
constraints: Do not claim: specific cleaning product recommendations
Do not claim: specific company associated with the inquiry
story_brief.problem: The traditional process of cleaning a fridge is time-consuming and may not adequately disinfect surfaces.
core_interaction_steps: Step 1: Remove all items from the fridge.
Step 2: Dispose of expired or unwanted items.
Step 3: Use a non-toxic cleaning solution to wipe down all surfaces.
Step 4: Dry surfaces before returning items.
